seo.title: Kitipong Sarachan | Flutter Developer
seo.description: Portfolio website built with Flutter Web

hero.headline: Kitipong Sarachan.
hero.description: I have a passion for mobile app development with Flutter and creating excellent user experiences. I focus on building well-architected, performant, and practical digital products.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: Over 20 years of experience in the software industry, particularly in mobile software, since the era of PDAs like Palm and Pocket PC.
Transitioned into the smartphone era, starting from Java Phone and Symbian to the current generation of Android and iOS.
Proficient in programming using C, C++, Java, Dart (Flutter), and also capable of using languages like Python, JavaScript, Objective-C, and SQL.
Experienced in the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) process.
Able to work as a team, help solve problems under pressure, and successfully complete projects.
Experienced in remote work with international teams across different time zones, such as Europe and the USA.
Experienced in connecting applications with Firebase, GraphQL, and Rest APIs.
Capable of deploying applications to both Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
Quick to learn new technologies and apply them effectively to work.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.summary: Supervise the entire app development process.
highlights: Lead the development of new game applications.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.summary: Develop software for digital TV broadcast equipment systems.
highlights: Built bot system for software testing and deployment.

experience.company: Jimmy Software co., Ltd. @ Chiang Mai
experience.title: Mobile Developer

featuredProjects.name: WeLink Application set
featuredProjects.summary: WeLink, a platform that connects all services to every lifestyle.
featuredProjects.longDescription: WeLink is an application that includes car-hailing, food delivery services, various task services, as well as a shop and restaurant system, and festival ticket booking. It also has dedicated applications for shops, restaurants, and riders.

featuredProjects.name: 24 CARFIX Application set
featuredProjects.summary: 24 CARFIX, an application for calling emergency car repair services 24 hours a day.
featuredProjects.longDescription: An application that gathers tow truck services, slide trucks, battery technicians, tire repair technicians, and locksmiths into one application.

featuredProjects.name: BK Live
featuredProjects.summary: BK Live, a livestreaming application for all ages.

featuredProjects.name: Zero Carbon
featuredProjects.summary: Carbon footprint calculation tool for carbon offset activities.
featuredProjects.longDescription: A tool to calculate the carbon footprint or greenhouse gas emissions of tourism activities such as ecotourism and adventure, agrotourism, gastrotourism, health tourism, cultural tourism, and tourism for all. Events such as sports competitions, music, concerts, festivals, and others. Meetings/seminars, international meetings, exhibitions, and incentive travel.

featuredProjects.name: POS Demo
featuredProjects.longDescription: A demo of a shop management system (Point of Sale) that can manage products, sell products, and view reports.

featuredProjects.name: Systemparts App
featuredProjects.summary: Application for buying and selling car parts.
featuredProjects.longDescription: An application for managing the purchase and sale of car parts.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.body: Interested in working together on exciting products and new opportunities in Mobile Application development.
